items.location: Ocean Drive, southern boardwalk — concrete alcove beneath the third pillar cluster from the south end, behind a rusted drainage grate facing the waterline.
Port Gellhorn Causeway, northbound lane — collapsed ramp section roughly 600 metres north of the toll booths, launching across the shipping canal toward the far embankment.
Downtown Vice, Calle Onda district — eleven-storey art deco office tower with an accessible lobby, freight elevator, and rooftop access via the east stairwell.
